Starting a Broker • 2/8/2026 • 7 min read

Building a Team for a New Forex Broker: Key Roles

What specialists are needed to launch and operate a forex broker: from compliance officer to tech lead.

MakeTrades Team
MakeTrades Expert

Core Team Structure

A minimum viable broker team includes five critical roles: Compliance Officer to manage regulatory requirements and KYC/AML procedures, Dealing Desk Operator for order execution and risk monitoring, IT Administrator for platform maintenance and security, Customer Support Representatives for client-facing operations, and a Marketing Manager for client acquisition strategies.

Scaling the Team

As the business grows beyond 500 active clients, add specialized roles: Risk Manager to oversee exposure and hedging strategies, Financial Controller for accounting and reporting, Sales Manager to lead the conversion team, and a dedicated Customer Success team for VIP client retention. Technical growth requires backend developers and QA engineers for platform customization.

Hiring Strategy

Prioritize industry experience for compliance and dealing desk roles where mistakes carry regulatory and financial consequences. For support and marketing, trainable talent with strong communication skills can be more cost-effective. Consider remote hiring for specialized roles to access global talent pools, particularly for compliance experts familiar with your target jurisdictions.

Tags: teamhiringbrokercompliancerecruitmentHR
